title: lora_training_pack
prompts: A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, standing on the white sands of Baia do Sancho in Brazil, the subject wears a vibrant emerald green silk slip dress and smiles warmly at the camera with the turquoise Atlantic ocean behind her.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, exploring the cobblestone streets of Dubrovnik Old Town at dusk, the subject wears a white linen button-down shirt tied at the waist and high-waisted denim shorts, captured mid-laugh while holding a gelato cone as warm street lamps illuminate the limestone architecture.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, overlooking the dramatic cliffs of Santorini during golden hour, the subject wears a sky-blue crochet halter top and gold hoop earrings, leaning against a white stone wall looking out at the caldera as the orange sunset reflects in the scene.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, inside a lush botanical garden in Singapore, the subject wears a tropical floral print sundress in shades of pink and orange, smelling a bright orchid with a gentle expression as soft dappled sunlight filters through the canopy.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a chic rooftop lounge in Tokyo overlooking the neon skyline, the subject wears a black leather moto jacket over a simple white tee, sitting with a cocktail in hand looking confidently at the lens with city lights creating a bokeh effect.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, hiking the trails of the Dolomites in Italy with Lago di Braies below, the subject wears a sage green athletic set and a light windbreaker, standing triumphantly on a rocky outcrop in the crisp mountain air.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, walking through a vibrant spice market in Marrakech, the subject wears a terracotta-colored cotton maxi dress and several gold necklaces, looking curiously at a pile of saffron amidst the warm earthy tones of the market.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, on a private boat in the Amalfi Coast, the subject wears a yellow ribbed bikini and oversized tortoise-shell sunglasses, reclining on the deck with the colorful village of Positano rising behind under bright midday sun.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a cozy cafe in Paris's Le Marais district, the subject wears a striped Breton top and a red silk scarf tied around the neck, looking down at a book with a soft smile in the morning light.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, standing in front of the Sydney Opera House at night, the subject wears a shimmering silver cocktail dress, looking over one shoulder with a playful smirk as harbor lights reflect off the water.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, in a field of lavender in Provence, the subject wears a white eyelet lace dress, spinning slowly with arms outstretched against a purple landscape and clear blue sky.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a high-end beach club in Tulum, the subject wears a black mesh cover-up over a gold bikini, sitting on a swinging chair with a coconut drink in a boho-chic setting with macrame and wood accents.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, exploring the ancient ruins of Petra in Jordan, the subject wears a khaki utility jumpsuit and a wide-brimmed hat, looking up in awe at the Treasury building as the red sandstone glows in the afternoon light.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a snowy retreat in Aspen, the subject wears a cream cashmere beanie, a heavy oversized knit sweater, and leggings, holding a steaming mug of cocoa near a fireplace with a warm glow.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, on a balcony overlooking the Grand Canal in Venice, the subject wears a deep red velvet dress, leaning on the railing watching the gondolas pass by in the romantic morning mist.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a vibrant street festival in Rio de Janeiro, the subject wears a sequined crop top and denim cut-offs, dancing with a joyful expression against a blur of motion and bright colors.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, in a minimalist art gallery in New York City, the subject wears a structured charcoal grey blazer and trousers, contemplating a large canvas with a serious expression under clean, clinical lighting.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a traditional tea house in Kyoto, the subject wears a soft peach silk kimono-style robe, kneeling on a tatami mat performing a tea ceremony with a garden visible through sliding doors.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, on a safari in the Serengeti, the subject wears a tan linen shirt and cargo pants, looking through binoculars with an excited grin against the golden savannah grass.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a trendy surf spot in Byron Bay, the subject wears a black long-sleeve rash guard and bikini bottoms, carrying a surfboard under one arm along the shoreline in the bright morning sun.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, in a library in Oxford, the subject wears a navy blue wool sweater and glasses, surrounded by stacks of old books with a studious look in the warm light of a desk lamp.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a vineyard in Napa Valley, the subject wears a white sundress and a straw hat, holding a glass of white wine against the backdrop of rolling green hills in soft, hazy afternoon sun.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, in the middle of Times Square at night, the subject wears a bright pink faux-fur coat, looking directly at the camera with a bold expression amidst a kaleidoscope of neon lights.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a hidden waterfall in Bali, the subject wears a simple black one-piece swimsuit, standing under the falling water with eyes closed in serenity amidst lush jungle greenery.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a jazz club in New Orleans, the subject wears a dark green lace dress, clapping along to the music with a wide smile in a dim, smoky room with purple accent lights.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, on a balcony in Monaco overlooking the harbor, the subject wears a white silk gown and diamond earrings, looking elegantly into the distance as luxury yachts are lit up below.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a flower market in Amsterdam, the subject wears a denim jacket over a floral skirt, holding a large bouquet of tulips with the canal and bicycles in the background.
A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, in a desert camp in Wadi Rum, the subject wears a white linen tunic and a headscarf, sitting by a campfire under a starry sky with flickering firelight.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a high-fashion shoot in Milan, the subject wears an avant-garde metallic silver top with a fierce expression under dramatic, high-contrast studio lighting.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a local bakery in Lisbon, the subject wears a yellow cardigan and jeans, biting into a pastry with a look of delight against a backdrop of blue azulejo tiles.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, on a bridge in Prague at sunrise, the subject wears a long beige trench coat, walking toward the camera with Gothic towers in the mist and cool blue light.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a beach bonfire in Malibu, the subject wears an oversized flannel shirt over a bikini, laughing as the orange glow of the fire illuminates the scene against the dark ocean.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, in a modern kitchen in Scandinavia, the subject wears a grey cashmere sweater, pouring coffee with a relaxed morning expression in a bright, minimalist room.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at the base of the Eiffel Tower, the subject wears a black beret and a leather skirt, looking up at the structure in wonder as the ironwork creates intricate shadows.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, in a colorful street in Cartagena, the subject wears a bright orange off-the-shoulder top, leaning against a vibrant yellow wall with bougainvillea hanging above in the intense midday sun.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a luxury spa in Iceland, the subject wears a white plush robe, relaxing in a steam room with a peaceful expression and the soft blue light of the lagoon visible through the window.
A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a horse ranch in Montana, the subject wears a denim shirt and a cowboy hat, stroking a horse's mane with a gentle smile against vast open plains.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, in a bustling night market in Bangkok, the subject wears a simple black tank top, holding street food with a curious expression amidst a blur of neon signs.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a classical concert in Vienna, the subject wears a deep emerald green evening gown, sitting in a velvet chair with a look of concentration amidst ornate gold leaf decor.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, on a swing over the rice terraces in Ubud, the subject wears a long flowing red dress, laughing while swinging over the green valley in soft tropical morning light.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a rooftop pool in Dubai, the subject wears a white designer bikini and gold jewelry, lounging on a white daybed with the Burj Khalifa in the background under a high sun.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, in a cozy bookstore in London, the subject wears a tan trench coat and a scarf, peeking through bookshelves with a playful look in warm, inviting lighting.
A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a vineyard in Tuscany, the subject wears a white linen dress, walking through rows of grapevines at sunset with golden rim-lighting.

A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a high-end gym in Los Angeles, the subject wears a sleek black athletic set, mid-workout with a determined expression in a modern gym with neon accents.
A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, on a balcony in Mykonos, the subject wears a white crochet dress, looking out at the blue Aegean sea with a serene smile against white-washed buildings.
A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a jazz festival in Montreal, the subject wears a vintage band tee and denim shorts, cheering with hands in the air under vibrant stage lights.
A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, in a traditional ryokan in Hakone, the subject wears a blue and white yukata, sitting on the floor looking out at Mount Fuji in soft morning light.
A smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 pro, at a beach club in Ibiza, the subject wears a sheer white cover-up over a turquoise bikini, dancing as the sun sets in a high-energy atmosphere.
